task_completion.description: Import the survey data from clearcreek_survey.csv into TopoCal.
task_completion.visual_evidence: TopoCal interface showing imported survey points in the viewport or a data table, or an import dialog referencing 'clearcreek_survey.csv'.

task_completion.description: Create a terrain model using the imported survey data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A triangulated irregular network (TIN), mesh, or 3D surface model visible in the TopoCal main viewport.

task_completion.description: Generate contour lines on the terrain model.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Topographic contour lines visible overlaid on the terrain model in the TopoCal viewport.
A profile view, elevation graph, or cross-section window visible within TopoCal.

task_completion.description: Export the completed plan to ClearCreek_TopoMap.dxf, configuring layers for elements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog saving to 'ClearCreek_TopoMap.dxf' in the ClearCreekProject folder, evidence of layer configuration in a layer manager/export settings, or the resulting DXF file visible in the file explorer.

task_completion.description: Save the TopoCal project file to the C:\Users\ directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing a TopoCal project file being saved in a path starting with 'C:\Users\', or the TopoCal window title bar displaying the saved project path.

integrity.description: The agent used the TopoCal GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with TopoCal menus, dialogs, and toolbars, rather than using terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The terrain, contours, and profile were genuinely generated by the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The contours and profile mathematically correspond to the loaded point data, rather than being manually drawn as disconnected lines to fake the appearance of a topographic map.

integrity.description: The agent saved the files to the exact requested directories.
integrity.visual_evidence: File explorer or save dialogs confirm the files are in the specified 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\ClearCreekProject\' path and not just saved to a default temporary directory.
